context: Agent must detect @deprecated decorator as a caller-visible contract change and update docstring while flagging README for human review. Baseline models often ignore decorators or over-rewrite README migration docs.

checklist.name: Deprecation documented in docstring
checklist.description: The fetch_user docstring is updated to indicate the function is deprecated and suggests using get_user instead

checklist.name: README flagged for review
checklist.description: The report flags README.md mention of fetch_user as [NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW] and does NOT auto-rewrite it

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
